case_title: BETTER SPACE, INC. VS CAPRETTA, ANTONIO / GAME LIVE

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BETTER SPACE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAPRETTA, ANTONIO / GAME LIVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CAPRETTA, ANTONIO / GAME LIVE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BETTER SPACE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER SPACE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-09-2002, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO MAY-16-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FURTHER TIME TO PROPERLY SERVE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BETTER SPACE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAPRETTA, ANTONIO / GAME LIVE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $113.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,113.00, PLUS INTEREST AT LEGAL RATE FROM 11/20/01 CAPRETTA/GAME LIVE TO TAKE NOTHING ON ITS CROSS-CLAIM. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 26929 ON 7/18/02 EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CAPRETTA, ANTONIO / GAME LIVE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BETTER SPACE, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAILING TO GAME LINE EVENTS RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BETTER SPACE, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CAPRETTA, ANTONIO / GAME LIVE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CAPRETTA, ANTONIO / GAME LIVE RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT BETTER SPACE, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $27.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,027.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CAPRETTA, ANTONIO / GAME LIVE
